list.description: SNMP target IP address of AT-XS916MXT
list.label: Instance
list.name: instance

title: AT-XS916MXT
description: Allied Telesis XS916MXT monitoring dashboard via SNMP exporter. Displays uptime, port status (UP/DOWN/SHUTDOWN), per-port traffic, VLAN/LAG traffic, errors, and discards.
